mapper.insert: INSERT INTO learning_resource (level_id, name, type, url, description, knowledge_points, order_num, visibility, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{levelId}, #{name}, #{type}, #{url}, #{description}, #{knowledgePoints}, #{orderNum}, #{visibility}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE learning_resource SET level_id = #{levelId}, name = #{name}, type = #{type}, url = #{url}, description = #{description}, knowledge_points = #{knowledgePoints}, order_num = #{orderNum}, visibility = #{visibility}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
